name: Spicy Party Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Salsa, hot or mild, of choice
4 Anaheim chili peppers, roasted, seeded, and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese and shredded Monterey Jack in a large bowl.
2. Beat with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
3. Add the sour cream and beat until well incorporated.
4. Stir in the eggs one at a time until just combined.
5. Mix in the salsa and chili (either roasted Anaheim peppers or canned green chile).
6. Pour the batter into a 9-inch springform pan and place on a baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes, or until the center is nearly set.
8. Immediately spread any remaining sour cream over the top of the cheesecake.
9. Cool completely on a rack.
10. Chill in the refrigerator for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
11. To serve, remove from the pan and garnish with the chopped tomato, tortilla chips, and fresh herbs (chives, cilantro, parsley).
